user.title: Import C-Bus Toolkit project
user.description: Fetch the project currently loaded by the C-Gate Server add-on, or upload a Toolkit backup manually.

connection.title: C-Gate connection
connection.description:
These settings are applied to every imported hub initially. Each hub can be changed independently after setup.

{project_summary}

data.status_port: Status Change port (0 uses command fallback)

connection_failed.title: C-Gate validation failed

confirm.title: Confirm C-Bus project

reconfigure.title: Update Toolkit project
reconfigure.description: Fetch the current project from C-Gate or upload a replacement file. Address-based entity IDs are preserved.

fetch_project.title: Fetch project from C-Gate
fetch_project.description: Connect to the C-Gate Server add-on command port and import the loaded Toolkit project using DBGETXML. Use the host name or IP address of the Home Assistant system running the add-on.

data.status_port: Status Change port (0 uses command fallback)

upload_project.title: Upload Toolkit project
upload_project.description: Upload a Toolkit CBZ, C-Gate DB, or legacy XML project. The file is parsed locally and setup can continue even while C-Gate is offline.

reconfigure_fetch.title: Fetch latest project from C-Gate
reconfigure_fetch.description: Fetch and compare the project currently loaded by C-Gate. The configured project name and first hub endpoint are pre-filled.

data.status_port: Status Change port (0 uses command fallback)

reconfigure_upload.title: Upload updated Toolkit project
reconfigure_upload.description: Upload a newer CBZ, DB, or XML project. Address-based entity IDs are preserved.

error.invalid_project: The uploaded file is not a valid supported C-Bus Toolkit project
error.cannot_fetch_project: Unable to fetch the project from C-Gate. Check the host, command port, project name, and the add-on integration_clients access list.
error.invalid_fetched_project: C-Gate returned project XML that could not be parsed as a supported Toolkit project.
error.different_project: The selected update belongs to a different C-Bus project.

abort.already_configured: This C-Bus project is already configured

init.title: C-Bus C-Gate settings
init.description: Choose which part of the integration to configure.

connections.title: Hub connections
connections.description: Choose a CNI/network hub to edit.

data.status_port: Status Change port (0 uses command fallback)

applications.title: Application mappings
applications.description: Choose a network application to map to a Home Assistant entity type. Each populated application is shown as its own Home Assistant device.

group_application.title: Group overrides
group_application.description: Choose the application containing the group.

data.optimistic: Update Home Assistant state immediately after commands
